title: Mizoram PSC – Junior Engineer – 8 Posts

basic_details.job_title: Mizoram PSC Junior Engineer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Mizoram Public Service Commission (Mizoram PSC) Recruitment 2026 for 8 posts of Junior Engineer (Civil). Candidates with Diploma Can Apply Online. The last date to apply online is 19-06-2026. The candidate shall apply online through Mizoram PSC official website mpsc.mizoram.gov.in.

qualification.education_qualification: High School Leaving Certificate (HSLC) with 3 years Diploma in Civil Engineering or above from Government recognized Institution, Computer Proficiency, Mizo Language Proficiency.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the Mizoram PSC Junior Engineer (Civil) Recruitment 2026.
seo_tags: Mizoram Public Service Commission Junior Engineer (Civil) Recruitment 2026
